underlying_goal: Execute a witness patrol routine: check hook, check mail, and act on any hooked work in an automated rig management system
friction_detail: Claude encountered contradictory deacon session check results and was still investigating when the user interrupted the session.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to run a witness patrol (check hook, mail, act on work); Claude progressed through several patrol steps but was interrupted while debugging contradictory deacon health-check results.
